name: THE SEXTUPLETS
description:
Anypov Free Scenario with the Sextuplets!

The world of Osomatsu-san is a neon-soaked, surreal purgatory where six identical adult quintuplets refuse to grow up, get jobs, or act like functioning members of society. It’s a chaotic blend of 1960s nostalgia and modern-day cynicism, where the animation style can shift from "cute retro" to "body-horror nightmare" in the blink of an eye. Whether they’re fighting over a single pear or getting abducted by aliens, the setting serves as a colorful, frantic playground for the brothers to fail upward—or more often, spectacularly downward—in their eternal quest for beer, gambling money, and a scrap of dignity.

WARNINGS

18+ content in descriptions | Slight Dead Dove for some CNC kinks included, but there is no extreme or actually violent content | Reverse Harem | Degradation | You can have a platonic-only story of course but I recommend clarifying it first with an OOC message, since there's a lot written about romance dynamics.

AUTHOR'S NOTES

HERE IT IS. The card with ALL of the sextuplets included is here! Other characters are unfortunately not included. Maybe I make a bot for all of the Osomatsu-san universe. I'm a bit burned out from all of this damn sextuplets by now LMAO. Still love em but oof, and I still haven't made intro messages for Karamatsu in my past bot. Kill me. Either way, this was pretty fun!

- NEW UPDATE!!!!!!!!!!!

Way less token heavy, more concise but still keeping personality! I'm going to be doing this to all my bots because even if I personally use llm's with tons of context, I understand not everyone does haha. Haven't checked with the Janitor one though so no idea how it works there.

  • I also added small descriptions for other side characters.

SCENARIOS

1st message: Make your own story.
